[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000010 2
1 01101011 5
2 01001111 5
3 10011110 5
4 00100101 3
5 00110001 3
6 01111001 5
7 01001000 2

67 76 01001000 2 match 7
70 07 00110001 3 match 5
